case_title: DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. GROUP SPECIALIST, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROUP SPECIALIST, INC. $2,756.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.88 INTEREST, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,936.88, DEFENDANT GROUP SPECIALIST, INC. NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-08-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GROUP SPECIALIST, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,756.00 FILED BY DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GROUP SPECIALIST, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
